query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, t.transactionType, t.ticker, t.shares, t.pricePerShare, t.currency, t.totalAmount, t.fxRate, t.totalAmountCHF 
FROM portfolios p 
LEFT JOIN portfolioTransactions t ON p.id = t.portfolioId 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%FX Fix%' 
ORDER BY t.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, t.transactionType, t.ticker, t.shares, t.pricePerShare, t.currency, t.totalAmount, t.fxRate, t.totalAmountCHF

LEFT JOIN portfolioTransactions t ON p.id = t.portfolioId 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%FX Fix%' 
ORDER BY t.id;
